axes: design — extend R5 OPT-D hash-chained ledger pattern from falsifier_registry to bridge_sha256
OPT-B generalization — ledger_verify.sh accepts --ledger {bridge|falsifier|PATH}; sentinel additively gains ledger=<basename> (raw 80 backward-compat)
rotation tool — bridge_sha256_rotate.sh standalone (NOT pre-commit hook; .githooks/ retired in commit e3137be2 per user decision)
mutation cycle test — 2-rotation chain on codata bridge; prev_hash chain integrity cross-validated
SECURITY_AUDIT §8.1 amendment — closes §6 R5+ candidate 'extend chain to bridge baselines'
aggregator weave — atlas_status_all + health_check_all both enriched (additive sentinel fields per raw 80)
tier_1: ledger_verify.sh patched (+~35 lines) — generalized via --ledger flag; back-compat preserved
bridge_sha256_rotate.sh new (~180 lines, bash 3.2 portable, no python)
pre-commit extension SKIPPED — .githooks/ retired by user (commit e3137be2); tool is standalone instead
mutation cycle 2-rotation chain test PASS (entry-1 prev_hash=genesis, entry-2 prev_hash=sha256(line1) cross-validated)
health_check_all.sh enriched — 5th subcheck (BL) added, bridge_ledger=<status>(<N>) sentinel field added
tier_2: bash 3.2 portable: pure shell + awk for TSV rewrite (no python required for rotation; verifier still uses python for JSON walk)
raw 71 honoured — REPORTS+ROTATES baseline only; never modifies bridge .hexa contents
raw 73 honoured — minimal additive surface; no new dependencies
raw 77 honoured — TSV comment+blank lines preserved verbatim through awk pass
raw 80 honoured — every sentinel change is additive (new fields appended, existing fields preserved)
ledger entry schema includes 'bridge' field for per-bridge audit trail (extension over falsifier ledger schema)

mutation_2_rotate.actual: sha 1e0c072ba7ac8443 → 06236b5c5d629de1; entry 2 prev_hash=5bf4fdfafd5033e78276073f07294d1faefac7f646875b1fbcf8d0c2293ca86a (manually verified equal to sha256(line1 with trailing \n stripped))

atlas_status_all_smoke.expected: new R5 bridge_ledger line; sentinel includes defense_r5_bridge_ledger field
atlas_status_all_smoke.actual: section 7 prints 'R5 bridge_ledger: EMPTY (entries=0 broken_at=none)'; sentinel ends with 'defense_r5_bridge_ledger=EMPTY(0) defense_r5_bridge_ledger_broken_at=none'

health_check_all_smoke.expected: BL field in compact line and sentinel

restoration.expected: codata bridge baseline 3f9992f3d5893c59 restored, ledger removed

deviation_from_brief.pre_commit_hook_extension: SKIPPED — .githooks/ directory was deliberately retired by user in commit e3137be2 ('R5 pre-commit hook deletion is now intentional'). Resurrecting the hook would contradict that explicit decision. Substituted with standalone tool/bridge_sha256_rotate.sh which is invokable manually, by cron, or by future automation. Mutation cycle test was performed via direct tool invocation rather than 'bash .githooks/pre-commit' to honour the same user decision while still validating the chain extension semantics.

fixpoint.reason: ledger_verify.sh DRY across both ledger types; bridge_sha256_rotate.sh end-to-end mutation cycle PASS with chain integrity cross-validated; aggregators emit additive sentinel fields; SECURITY_AUDIT amended; restoration verified. Further iteration would only enable OPT-B SSH signing on the bridge ledger (gated by user authorization, identical pattern to falsifier ledger §8 OPT-B stub).

compliance.raw_71: REPORTS+ROTATES baseline TSV + ledger only; bridge .hexa contents never modified
compliance.raw_73: minimal additive surface; bash 3.2 portable; no new external deps
